description_long: This jewelry store, named 'GREEN VAULT JEWELS', features a prominent pink and brown facade with bold signage above the entrance. The storefront is framed by vertical columns and a checkered black-and-white tile floor at the entrance, giving it a classic yet inviting appearance. Large blue-tinted display windows dominate the lower half of the front, allowing for clear visibility into the store's interior. Security cameras are mounted on the upper corners of the building, indicating a focus on safety. The sides and rear of the building are solid pink panels bordered by black vertical strips, with no windows or doors visible. The flat roof is finished in a light wood texture, adding a touch of warmth to the overall design.
description: A pink and brown jewelry store with bold signage, large blue display windows, and security cameras on the facade.
description_view_0: Front view showing the 'GREEN VAULT JEWELS' sign, blue display windows, checkered tile entrance, and security cameras.
description_view_1: Side view displaying a solid pink panel bordered by black strips and the edge of the flat wooden roof.
description_view_2: Rear view with a large uninterrupted pink panel and black borders, plus visible security cameras on the roof corners.
description_view_3: Opposite side view mirroring the other side, with a solid pink panel and black borders, and the wooden roof edge.
attribute_storefront_signage: A rectangular pink sign above the entrance with the text 'GREEN VAULT JEWELS' in bold, uppercase, serif letters. The sign is bordered by brown framing and is centrally placed above the display windows.
attribute_security_features: Two security cameras mounted on the upper front corners of the building, angled to monitor the entrance and surrounding area.
